title: Golden Goodies
description: A simple Fabric mod that adds golden variants to vanilla crops
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5cd87cfbb0e4d10aa84b0adcf12f906d5ee2b78.png) A simple Fabric mod that adds golden variants to vanilla crops ## Items Included - Golden Carrot > Absorption & Speed II - Golden Potato > Absorption & Strength II - Golden Beetroot > Absorption & Haste II - Golden Sweet Berries > Absorption & Invisibility - Golden Glow Berries > Absorption & Night Vision ## Crafting
Screenshots ![8 gold and a carrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/187bae1f4490dbb474cfcd47b8b76e6919af7fa8.png) ![8 gold and a potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45bbd692e82b548bc42427ee3f1daeb482429fb5.png) ![8 gold and a beetroot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e6b5194fa15611dd02bcbbc34bee926e4d252a3.png) ![8 gold and sweet berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1549aae76c02fab81511f5b37cbc3725b167171d.png) ![8 gold and glow berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92d189a2b4e389fcf6e7622dbb2f240e969bc0ce.png)
## Compatibility - Fabric 1.15.7+ - Minecraft 1.20.1-1.20.6 ## Permissions MIT License; feel free to use it in your modpack or use any of the code for your use ## Links - Source Code - Downloads - Issue Tracker ## Try my other mods - Recipe Tweaks
